Off Calendar Mar-11-2010 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On May-04-10 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff in Propria Persona for failure to appear at Pre-Arbitration Settlement Conference on 1/19/2010 is heard this day. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $250.00, for failure to appear. Court ordered case removed from Judicial Arbitration and scheduled for an Order to Show Cause re: Dismissal pursuant to
CRC 3.1385 on 5/4/2010 at 10:00 AM, in Department 212. Proceedings not reported. (212)
